title: consolida regalis subsp. divaricata
intro: Consolida regalis subsp. divaricata, also known as the sky blue cornflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Consolida regalis subsp. divaricata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and promote relaxation.
